reasoning: C wins on the central test of internal spread: its five forms break different assumptions AND live in different mediums (double-entry ledger, climate almanac, school-grades-itself folded card, a paper-free box of physical objects with a voice memo, and a map of only what was deliberately NOT taught), with the Reciprocal Card and Artifact Reliquary being the freshest swings. B is the most rigorously developed and explicitly names each load-bearing assumption it snaps (author, success, individual-as-unit, backward-clock, contemporary reader), and the Forward Contract and Hundred-Year Card are genuinely bold, but it edges just behind C on surprise. A trails because its five cluster (Question Museum, Unofficial Biography, and Contribution Ledger reuse the future-self/personhood/community frames) and stay closer to the predictable, each carrying only a sentence or two of development.
